hero.title: Every Gift Tells A Story.
hero.description: At Deep Decors, we believe gifting is more than an exchange—it's an experience. Every creation is crafted with elegance, attention to detail, and a touch of luxury to make every occasion unforgettable.

slides.alt: Premium dry fruit and cookie hamper, gift-wrapped with a gold ribbon and flowers
Luxury white gift bag finished with a gold and maroon ribbon bow
Designer handbag gift wrapped in a dried flower basket

items.title: Wedding Gifts
items.description: Bridal jewellery presentations, trousseau boxes, and return gifts wrapped with heirloom-level detail.

items.title: Luxury Hampers
items.description: Curated hampers with premium dry fruits, cookies, and handpicked artisan products—wrapped in elegance.

items.title: Festive Gifts
items.description: Diwali, New Year, and corporate festive hampers—premium presentation for every celebration.

items.title: Clothing Packaging
items.description: Sarees, suits, and outfits wrapped in flowing fabric, pearls, and a signature floral flourish.

items.title: Custom Luxury Gifts
items.description: Bring your own designer pieces—we wrap them in our signature luxury style with premium materials.

reviews.name: Simran K.
reviews.review: Deep Decors made my sister's birthday unforgettable. The hamper was so beautifully wrapped—she thought it was from a 5-star boutique. Absolutely premium quality!

reviews.name: Rahul M.
reviews.review: Ordered corporate gifts for our team of 30. Every single box was immaculate. The attention to detail is remarkable. Will definitely order again for Diwali.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.review: The custom wedding hampers exceeded every expectation. Guests kept asking where we got them from. Deep Decors is in a league of their own.
